Permafrost Crystals  
 

Quest Item
This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Permafrost Crystals
Quest Item
This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:1000
Merchant Value:0 pp 0 gp 1 sp 0 cp
Lucy Entry By:Atarak
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-17 05:20:55
Page Updated:Sat Sep 10th, 2022

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 20pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 35
[Drops | Quests | Recipes | Comments ]
This item is a ground spawn.

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Everfrost Peaks
NPC Name
an ice giant - Everfrost Peaks
goblin miner

Miragul's Menagerie
NPC Name
a rambling ice brute

Permafrost Keep
NPC Name
a goblin evoker - Permafrost Keep
a goblin patriarch
a goblin preacher
a goblin priest
an elite goblin guard
an ice giant - Permafrost Keep
an ice giant magus - Permafrost Keep
an ice giant priest - Permafrost Keep
an ice goblin
an icy terror
The Chilling Terror
the goblin sage

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

The Plane of Knowledge
Quest Name
The Frozen Crystal
Used in 4 recipes.
Recipe list - Premium only.

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Everfrost Peaks
Miragul's Menagerie
Permafrost Keep
Ground spawn at the following locations: 271, 6, 2 (down the ramp, left through the first door, then right behind a door in a dead-end room); 312, 173, 2 (west from the previous location, then hug the right wall to find ti in the area of the broken walls); 467, 363, -40 (in the pit with wolves); 277, 433, -40 (in the pit with wolves); 260, -15, -26 (far east in the wolf pit, then south and up a level - two in there); 410, 330, 16 (west from the archaeologist, around the bridge and curved path).


Uploaded November 16th, 2023 by iventheassassin
Send a correction

Locations for ground spawns
QuoteReply
# Aug 26 2012 at 8:14 AM Rating: Good
Shuraz
Sage
1,086 posts
found one at p271 x p6 x p2. if you come down the ramp and take the first left thorugh the first door - then turn right - its behind that door. a tiny little dead end room.
another at p312 x p173 x p2. same level obviously ( height at 2). if you head west from the first one and hug right wall its the first area where the walls are broken.
the posted locations from bgb may work for maps, but they sem to be reversed for /loc in game
another at p467 x p363 x n40 ( bgb posted P -363.2994, -467.1427, -41.9667, 0, 0, 127, 1, pc ). This one is in the pit with the wolves
another at p277 x p433 x n40 (bgb posted P -432.6636, -276.9767, -41.9667, 0, 0, 127, 1, pc ) also in the wolf pit
two in a small room far east in the wolf pit then south and up a level. p260 x n15 x n26 ( using 1 location for both )
and p410 x p330 x p16. not too far from archaeologist ( west but around the bridge and curved path)

▲ Page top
Farming these
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2007 at 9:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591923873379
Scholar
319 posts
There are only three ice giant spawns in Everfrost Peaks, so this is not a great spot to get Permafrost Crystals.

In Everfrost Keep there are bunch of mobs that drop them. Seemingly any gobbie, or ice giant can drop them. I killed a few wolves, and cone dudes, but no blue treasures from them. There are also ground spawns which I chanced upon on occassion. The ground spawns look like a brown blob. Pretty obvious once you see them. The map coordinates can't be used as a /loc per my memory of the past. Maybe I should cut and paste the map spawn sites listed below into my map file for this zone, and then it would work (I hope).

The best drop rate was from gobbies in the jail area, where there are also a few ground spawns. But the jail gobbies quickly are killed, and all of the gobbies in the zone drop it, so just go hog wild killing gobbies. Who cares if Lady Vox or Nagafen hate you more? You don't need to be uber to farm the gobbies, but be prepared for adds. Some gobbies add and some will let you run right on by. The elites and maybe a few others near where the king spawns see invis, but no other gobbies or ice giants see invis. The cone dudes also see invis, but if you are fighting them, you are in the wrong place, and might be banished soon.

If you go for the ice giants, they are a little tougher, and run. The ice giants also have a wide visual aggro range. Stay away from where Lady Vox's room (which is kind of near the ice giants), because she banishes anyone over level 52 to Everfrost Peaks if they get too close to her lair.

I got a little over a stack of Permafrost crystals in a little over an hour.
There is no experience to be had here at all for a level 75.
▲ Page top
Farming these
QuoteReply

157 posts
Add this to your permafrost map for locs of
groundspawn

P 2.7450, -261.4126, -27.9980, 0, 0, 127, 1, pc
P 16.7530, -260.5837, -27.9980, 0, 0, 127, 1, pc
P -363.2994, -467.1427, -41.9667, 0, 0, 127, 1, pc
P -432.6636, -276.9767, -41.9667, 0, 0, 127, 1, pc
P -332.4503, -412.4654, 14.0020, 0, 0, 127, 2, pc
P -173.4500, -313.5611, 0.0020, 0, 0, 127, 2, pc
P -7.5808, -275.0196, 0.0020, 0, 0, 127, 2, pc

Also mobs in same area drop it fairly often.
Took an hour or so for 1 stack.

# Oct 07 2003 at 12:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759923715

I found two different ground spawns the other day around the Goblin Archeologist area in two different small indentations with a goblin at the same spot. They appear as a small black rock with reddish stripes, similar as a chunk of velium if held. Also the same appearance as the ground spawn items in Eastern Wastes in Velious.
